_comment: Cornerstone Facilities Group — fill every field with real numbers before going live. Fields marked TODO are placeholders.
name: Cornerstone Facilities Group

revenue_and_profit._note: All figures in USD. TTM = trailing twelve months.

debt_and_cash._note: annual_debt_service = all scheduled P+I payments in the next 12 months.

owner_dependent_processes: all client contract renewals negotiated personally by owner
no documented standard operating procedures for crew scheduling
owner is the only person with vendor pricing relationships

documentation._note: documentation_completeness_pct = % of standard diligence docs that are organized and available.

sale_context._note: Used by sale readiness scoring and buyer persona questions.
